title: try_load_wallet_fvks_matches_direct_derivation test is the key regression guard
description: The test try_load_wallet_fvks_matches_direct_derivation writes a known 64-byte seed to wallet.key, then compares the Sapling default address from try_load_wallet_fvks (production path, read from disk + decrypt) against test_wallet_fvks (direct seed-to-FVK derivation). This is the regression guard for the bug fixed in commit 3aa54ef: previously generate_wallet stored the ZIP-32 master key instead of the BIP-39 seed. If the stored bytes are the master key (the old bug), from_seed applied BLAKE2b internally would double-derive and produce a different address — the assertion would fail. Do not replace this test with a 'just check it returns Some' assertion.
